name: Quartermaster
description: A remote inventory-management station for nearby containers, tool racks, display cases, and shelves. Place a Quartermaster's Desk anywhere, then interact to browse, search, and filter everything stored within range by category. Withdraw items straight into your inventory, deposit items back into storage, or middle-click an item to locate its containers with blue markers and floating text labels visible through walls. Set LocateOnly in the config for a read-only station. Back up your world before relying on any storage-moving feature.
